title: Fixes #4: Task: Config loader v3 [#4]
body:
## Summary

Rewrite `loadConfig()` in `github-daemon.mjs` to support the v3 camelCase API, `.agenTica.ts` config files, and the `hookable` hook system bootstrapped via `lifecycle.ts`.

## Changes

### camelCase key rename (clean break — no shim for old SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE keys)
- All global CONFIG keys renamed: `POLL_INTERVAL_MS` → `pollIntervalMs`, `LOG_FILE` → `logFile`, `LABELS` → `labels`, `QUERY` → `buildQuery`, `PICKER` → `pickIssue`, `IS_BLOCKED` → `isBlocked`, `GET_AGENT` → `getAgent`, `GET_CODE_PROMPT` → `getCodePrompt`, `GET_REVIEW_PROMPT` → `getReviewSkill`
- All agent config keys renamed: `COMMAND` → `command`, `MODEL` → `model`, `MODELS` → `models`, `SKILL_FILE` → `skillFile`, `LABELS` → `labels`, `GET_BASE_BRANCH` → `getBaseBranch`, `BRANCH_PREFIX` → `branchPrefix`, `GET_SKILL` → `getSkill`, `ARGS` → `args`, `GET_MODEL` → `getModel`
- All call sites in the daemon updated to use new camelCase keys

### `.agenTica.ts` support
- `.agenTica.ts` is detected before `.agenTica.js`
- Loaded via `tsx/esm` `tsImport` when available
- Falls back to `@swc-node/register/esm` if tsx is unavailable
- Warns clearly when neither is available and a `.ts` config is detected
- `tsx` added as a runtime dependency; `autobot` script updated to `node --import tsx/esm`

### Hook system bootstrap
- `createDaemonHooks()` is called from `lifecycle.ts` inside `loadConfig()`
- `hooks.addHooks(userConfig.hooks ?? {})` bulk-registers user hooks
- `CONFIG.hooks` is returned and available to the daemon tick
- `CONFIG.userConfig` is returned for `onStart`/`onStop` access

### Process lifecycle
- `onStart(ctx)` is called in `main()` after hooks are registered
- `onStop(ctx)` is called in `shutdown()` before process exit on SIGINT/SIGTERM

## Triage

See `.agents/triage/4.md` for root cause analysis and fix plan.

Fixes #4
